history.text: Christopher Columbus reached Jamaica appears in Jamaica's historical record.
England captured Jamaica from Spain changed control of the territory.
Slavery was abolished in the British Empire, including Jamaica.

worthSeeing.title: Reggae Heritage:
worthSeeing.text: Bob Marley's homeland is the birthplace of reggae, ska and dancehall music.

worthSeeing.title: Blue Mountain Coffee:
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's most prized coffees, grown in misty mountain rainforest.

worthSeeing.title: Dunn's River Falls:
worthSeeing.text: A stunning tiered waterfall you can climb in a human chain.
